title: Pack Manifest
description: Root manifest file for a Conversation Simulator scenario pack (manifest.yaml). All characters and situations must be entirely fictional.

fictional.description: Must be true. Confirms all characters and situations are entirely fictional and no real person is impersonated.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this pack (e.g. job-interview-basic).

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the pack library.

description.description: Brief summary shown to players in the library.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. Apache-2.0, MIT, CC-BY-4.0).

tags.description: Descriptive tags for filtering in the library. Must be lowercase kebab-case.

scenarios.description: Relative paths to scenario YAML files included in this pack.

npcs.description: Relative paths to NPC definition YAML files.

rubrics.description: Relative paths to rubric YAML files.

examples.name: Job Interview Practice
examples.description: Practice common job interview scenarios with a fictional hiring manager.
examples.author: Conversation Simulator Contributors
